---
title: "Siddharth Tumre"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:siddharth.tumre@outlook.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/siddharthtumre
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/siddharth-tumre/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/siddharth_tumre
comments: false
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a Researcher at [TCS Research](https://www.tcs.com/what-we-do/research) in the Data and Decision Sciences Research Area, based in Pune, India. I am passionate about research and strongly believe that scientific inquiry can advance our understanding of intelligence and help solve complex real-world problems.

[View Full Curriculum Vitae →](CV1104.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

## Education

**Indian Institute of Technology Delhi**
: M.Tech in Computer Technology | 2021–2023

**Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology**
: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering | 2017–2021

## Experience

TCS Research (_TRDDC_) | Researcher | September 2023 - present

:::
